text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm so nervous... What if I lose again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've reviewed my training and tackled the reasons
for my losses... I've done everything I could to
prepare for today's race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The results of the last race were frustrating, but
I'm determined to place first today.
choice_data_list: I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Those who fear the starting gate will
never reach the goal, as they say! I'm going to
keep that in mind as I run today's race!
